burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; chronic sicca symptoms and fatigue

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Sicca symptoms with anti-SSA/SSB or salivary gland biopsy; Schirmer test and salivary flow

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Rheumatology referral for autoantibodies and biopsy when needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Artificial tears/saliva, pilocarpine where available, hydroxychloroquine for systemic symptoms
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited rheumatology access and specialty testing outside metros
